name: Lo Mein Shrimp-Chicken-Pork-Beef
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Flank steak or shrimp, chicken, or beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti as directed on the package, until al dente, then drain and rinse in cold water. Add a few drops of oil and mix to prevent sticking. Set aside.
2. Slice steak (or shrimp/chicken/beef) very thin, across the grain, into 2-inch pieces. Mix together with ginger, scallion, cornstarch, sugar, and light soy. Set aside to marinate.
3. Heat wok to smoking point, add 2 tablespoons of peanut oil. Stir fry meat mixture for two minutes, ensuring it does not overcook. Reserve.
4. Add another tablespoon of oil, heat, then stir fry carrots and cabbage for two minutes. Add spaghetti and stir well until combined. Cook for a few more minutes.
5. Add the reserved meat mixture, 1 tablespoon of soy sauce, and salt. Stir for one minute to heat through and serve. Enjoy!
